8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">=20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.pushover/blob/master/package.json).
